rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers used in AGREE contracts are valid AADL features or declared helpers in the same annex scope.
Use only visible AADL features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation-level AGREE assignments and guarantees.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, ensure all referenced identifiers are properly declared or visible in the current scope.
Avoid placing implementation-specific bindings in component type annexes; use implementation scopes for such constructs.
Validate that AGREE expressions have consistent types and that helper declarations match their assigned values.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assignments in implementation scopes should reference existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
anti_patterns: Do not reference undefined identifiers in AGREE contracts; this leads to type errors and unresolved references.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scopes; use component type annexes for such contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE annex placement in component types vs implementations
